name: Smokey Mushroom and Tasso Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 red skin potatoes (about 8 ounces), sliced 1/2-inch thick, and blanched until tender
4 ounces mozzarella cheese, cut into 1/2-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Oil one side of the cedar plank.
3. Spread the potatoes slightly mounded in the center of the cedar plank and season with salt and pepper.
4. In a bowl, toss the shiitake mushrooms with some olive oil and season.
5. Sprinkle the mushrooms over the potatoes.
6. Sprinkle the tasso and cheese evenly on top, making sure it is fairly even and not too close to the edges.
7. Place the plank in the center of the grill and cover with a lid.
8. Allow to cook for 10-12 minutes. Be cautious as there will be smoke.
